summary: The user attended a Billie Eilish concert at the Wells Fargo Center in Philadelphia with their sister and is planning to buy concert merchandise online. They discussed tips for finding rare merchandise, preserving and framing their concert ticket stub, and selecting a photo to pair with it for display.
facts: The user attended a Billie Eilish concert at the Wells Fargo Center in Philadelphia with their sister on the same day as the chat session. The user plans to buy new concert merchandise online. The user is considering framing their concert ticket stub along with a photo of themselves and their sister from the concert. The user is thinking of using Shutterfly or Snapfish for printing their photo. The user is looking for tips on how to properly care for their framed photo and ticket stub to ensure they last a long time.
